summary: Add authenticated desktop workspace sync backed by CockroachDB and render the desktop dashboard as a blank workspace surface.

review_items.summary: Adds user-owned workspaces with a name and timestamps.
Creates the workspaces table with user ownership, name bounds, timestamps, and per-user workspace name uniqueness.
Adds /api/desktop/workspaces for authenticated desktop session GET and POST workspace sync with JSON error responses for load and create failures.
The desktop app fetches workspaces from the protected API and prompts for the first workspace when none exist, then renders a blank workspace surface.
The desktop app reports non-JSON API failures with the HTTP status instead of surfacing a JSON parser error.
The desktop dashboard renders a blank workspace surface after workspace load.

security_data_rules: Workspace API requests from rust-diffforge must include a valid desktop session bearer token.
The API must scope all workspace reads and writes to the authenticated desktop session user_id.
Workspace API failures must return JSON error payloads and must not expose database connection details.
Workspace names must be bounded, trimmed, and non-empty before insert.
The desktop app must not show hard-coded placeholder workspaces once workspace sync is available.

safe_deploy_order: Deploy the next-diffforge desktop workspaces API.
Ship the rust-diffforge blank workspace sync.

tests.summary: Validate policy JSON and SQL graph references.
